summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Booking System for Alif Amin Academy. Backend API tests: 24 passed, 2 skipped (for <24h cancellation scenarios). Frontend tests: All UI components working correctly including Dashboard, Booking Modal, Cancel Dialog, Edit Modal, and Schedule page.

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 passed, 2 skipped - no bookings within 24h to test no-refund cancellation)

seed_data_creation: Student has existing bookings from testing (multiple cancelled and scheduled bookings). Wallet has credits from previous top-ups.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Booking System fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) All 5 backend endpoints working correctly (create, my-bookings, cancel, edit, available-teachers), 2) Credit deduction: 15min=1credit, 30min=2credits, 60min=4credits, 3) Cancellation policy working: >24h=full refund, <24h=no refund (requires confirm_no_refund=True), 4) Edit booking adjusts credits automatically, 5) Frontend components all functional with proper data-testid attributes

frontend_tests: Student Dashboard loads with Next Class card - PASSED
Book a Session button opens BookingModal - PASSED
BookingModal has duration selector (15/30/60 min) - PASSED
BookingModal shows teacher list with available teachers - PASSED
BookingModal shows credit summary (required vs balance) - PASSED
My Schedule page loads with calendar view - PASSED
My Schedule shows All Bookings list - PASSED
Schedule cards have Edit and Cancel buttons - PASSED
Cancel dialog shows booking details - PASSED
Cancel dialog shows Full Refund notice for >24h - PASSED
Edit modal shows current booking data - PASSED
Edit modal has duration, date, time, teacher fields - PASSED
Wallet page shows credit balance breakdown - PASSED
Wallet page shows top-up packages - PASSED

feature_verification.GET /api/booking/my-bookings: WORKING - Returns student's bookings with teacher info, duration, credits
feature_verification.POST /api/booking/{id}/cancel: WORKING - >24h notice returns full refund, <24h requires confirm_no_refund=True
feature_verification.PUT /api/booking/{id}/edit: WORKING - Can change duration, time, teacher; credits adjusted automatically
feature_verification.frontend_dashboard_next_class: WORKING - Shows upcoming session with teacher name, date, time, duration
feature_verification.frontend_booking_modal: WORKING - Duration selector, date, time, teacher list, credit summary
feature_verification.frontend_cancel_dialog: WORKING - Shows refund policy (24h rule), booking details
feature_verification.frontend_edit_modal: WORKING - Pre-populated with current booking data, can modify all fields

mocked_integrations.stripe_payment: MOCKED - Stripe payment processing for wallet top-ups

business_logic_verified.credit_costs: 15 min = 1 credit, 30 min = 2 credits, 60 min = 4 credits
business_logic_verified.cancellation_policy: >24 hours = full credit refund, <24 hours = no refund (requires confirmation)
business_logic_verified.edit_credit_adjustment: Duration upgrade charges more credits, downgrade refunds excess
business_logic_verified.credit_deduction_order: Paid credits deducted first, then bonus credits
